'''Cy'een''' were [[Fish/Legends|fish]]-[[Lizard/Legends|lizards]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to [[Chad/Legends|Chad]] with [[Bronze/Legends|bronze]] scales and long, thick necks. These creatures were considered beautiful and were known to sing.

{{Creature-stub}}
